description_long: This is a vintage-style van with a boxy, elongated body and rounded edges, painted in a faded turquoise color with a white roof. The van features large, rectangular windows along both sides, a wide windshield, and circular headlights at the front. The wheels are simple and white, and the body shows signs of wear and subtle grime, suggesting frequent use. The van is parked on a black surface, accompanied by a campfire, rocks, and a jerry can, evoking a camping or road trip scenario. The overall design is reminiscent of classic camper vans from the mid-20th century, with utilitarian yet charming aesthetics. The van's exterior is primarily metal, with glass windows and rubber tires, and likely contains a hollow interior for passengers or cargo.
description: A vintage turquoise van with a white roof, large side windows, and rounded features, parked beside camping items. The van has a worn, utilitarian look reminiscent of classic camper vans.
description_view_0: Front and left side of the turquoise van, showing the windshield, headlights, side windows, and camping items in front.
description_view_1: Rear and left side of the van, highlighting the taillights, rear windows, and camping gear beside it.
description_view_2: Rear and right side of the van, focusing on the back doors, taillights, and uninterrupted side windows.
description_view_3: Front and right side of the van, displaying the windshield, headlights, and right-side windows with camping items behind.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
